data.summary: Insufficient evidence to validate the requirement for retainage release upon 100% completion.
data.assessment: The exploratory step aimed to validate the requirement of a retainage release trigger upon 100% completion. However, the evidence provided does not include any API reads or checks that confirm the functionality of releasing retainage based on completion status. The only related evidence is a summary of the use case, which does not demonstrate that the system can trigger a retainage release as specified.
gaps: No evidence of API endpoints or functionality for triggering retainage release upon completion.

deterministicFollowUps.title: Add deterministic evidence contract
deterministicFollowUps.assertion: Define concrete endpoint calls and assertions that directly verify the retainage release requirement.
